<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["name","domain","email","password","plan_id"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Nombre del tenant","example":"EmpresaDemo"},"domain":{"type":"string","description":"Dominio para el tenant","example":"demooooo"},"email":{"type":"string","format":"email","description":"Correo electrónico","example":"admin@empresa.com"},"password":{"type":"string","format":"password","description":"Contraseña","example":"123456"},"plan_id":{"type":"integer","description":"ID del plan a asignar","example":1}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"message":{"type":"string","example":"Tenant registrado exitosamente"},"data":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","example":"31845898-ba4b-4b59-b932-a6d34730cc55"},"name":{"type":"string","example":"EmpresaDemo"},"domain":{"type":"string","example":"demooooo"},"email":{"type":"string","example":"admin@empresa.com"}}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
